stepAnswer: The amplitude of the oscillations decreases over time
stepTitle: Which of the following best describes the effect of a damping factor on the graphs of harmonic motion functions?
choices: The amplitude of the oscillations decreases over time
The amplitude of the oscillations decreases over time.
The frequency of the oscillations increases over time.
The phase shift of the oscillations changes periodically.
The vertical shift of the oscillations increases over time.
